MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DESPITE BEING GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO DO SO, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE TENDER AND ALL ELEMENTS OF CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT BY VIRTUE OF ASSIGNMENT DEED OF TRUST LOSES ITS PRIORITY. SEE HOHN V. RIVERSIDE COUNTY (1964) 228 CAL.APP.2D 605; CCP 764.045. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B IN FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is
SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Despite being given an opportunity to do so, Plaintiff failed to allege tender and all elements of cause of action for breach of warranty of habitability. Additionally, Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that by virtue of assignment Deed of Trust loses its priority. See Hohn v. Riverside County (1964) 228 Cal.App.2d 605; CCP 764.045. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendants' Bank of America, Recontrust Company N.A. and The Bank of New York Mellon's Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend to allege tender; duty under CCC 2924b(c)(2), breach of duty under CCC 2924g; fraud with particularity; all elements of breach of warranty of habitability. Plaintiff shall also allege actionable conduct in view of Ross v. Title Guar. & Trust Co. (1934) 136 Cal. App. 393, 399. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS sustained with leave to amend as causes of action:
One (1)- to allege duty re CC 2924b(c)(2) and breach of duty CC 2924(g);
Two (2) - to allege fraud with particularity and reliance;
Six (6) - to allege all elements of breach of warranty of habitability; and 3,4,5,7,8 to allege tender. No opposition fied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
